requirement_topic.en: TS EN 62109 Safety Evidence for PV Inverter Power Converters
requirement_topic.zh: 光伏逆变器功率转换器TS EN 62109安全证据
requirement_topic.zht: 光伏逆變器功率轉換器TS EN 62109安全證據

summary.en: For Switzerland-facing PV inverters, TS EN 62109-1 and TS EN 62109-2 are commonly the relevant safety baseline for grid-connected power converters where SNV-adopted pathways or project requirements request it. Switzerland is not an EEA member, so conformity is handled through Swiss-adopted routes rather than direct EU-market legal status, and evidence should be mapped to the exact model and site conditions.
summary.zh: 面向瑞士的光伏逆变器通常在SNV采标路径或项目要求下以TS EN 62109-1和TS EN 62109-2作为并网功率转换器相关安全基线。瑞士并非EEA成员，因此合规通过瑞士采标路径处理而非直接EU市场地位，证据需映射到具体型号和场景。
summary.zht: 面向瑞士的光伏逆變器通常在SNV採標路徑或項目要求下以TS EN 62109-1和TS EN 62109-2作為併網功率轉換器相關安全基線。瑞士並非EEA成員，因此符合性透過瑞士採標路徑處理而非直接EU市場地位，證據需映射到具體型號和場景。

standards_or_laws: SNV route under CE-aligned Swiss adoption where applicable

summary.en: China baseline evidence may include GB/T 37408, GB/T 19964, and related performance or grid-connection reports. These are useful for engineering comparison but do not replace Switzerland-facing EN/IEC safety evidence in CE-aligned acceptance contexts.
summary.zh: 中国基线通常包括GB/T 37408、GB/T 19964以及相关性能或并网报告。这些文件对工程比较有价值，但在瑞士CE对齐接受环境下不能替代瑞士面向TS EN IEC的安全证据。
summary.zht: 中國基線通常包括GB/T 37408、GB/T 19964及相關性能或併網報告。這些文件對工程比較有價值，但在瑞士CE對齊接受環境下不能替代瑞士面向TS EN IEC的安全證據。

gap.en: The key gap is evidence scope and traceability: target model family, power ratings, thermal assumptions, isolation design, protection philosophy, voltage and frequency settings, commissioning logs, and multilingual labels and warnings for Switzerland.
gap.zh: 主要差距在于证据范围与可追溯性：目标型号系列、功率等级、热假设、隔离设计、保护策略、电压和频率参数、投运日志，以及面向瑞士的多语言标签和警示。
gap.zht: 主要差距在於證據範圍與可追溯性：目標型號系列、功率等級、熱假設、隔離設計、保護策略、電壓與頻率參數、投運日誌，以及面向瑞士的多語言標籤和警示。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where SNV-adopted EN/IEC safety evidence is requested by the project owner, distributor, network operator, or importer for Switzerland-facing interconnection.
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — China GB/T safety evidence is China baseline only.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] TS EN 62109 reporting helps close the technical gap only when mapped to Switzerland-facing project settings and commissioning scope, including 230/400 V and 50 Hz protections.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 只有在映射到瑞士目标项目设置和投运范围（含230/400 V与50 Hz保护要求）后，TS EN 62109报告才可用于技术差距补齐。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 只有在映射到瑞士目標項目設置和投運範圍（含230/400 V與50 Hz保護要求）後，TS EN 62109報告才可用於技術差距補齊。
